description: Kevin Cole from Temporal discusses efficient Solana programs, highlighting improvements in network performance and robustness, including the development of new clients and networking protocols. He introduces Peregrine, a framework aimed at enhancing efficiency in Solana programs, which significantly reduces executable size and block space usage.
topic_summary: Cole outlines the shift in focus towards performance optimization in Solana, detailing advancements in client development, packet ingestion, and the introduction of the Peregrine framework for efficient program execution [t=3:04 - t=232:84].
